description: This is a minimalist wooden bed frame with a simple headboard. The frame is constructed from light-colored wood, likely beech or a similar hardwood, featuring a slatted base for mattress support. Metal brackets are visible at the corners, indicating a sturdy construction. The design is clean and modern, emphasizing natural materials and simple lines. The headboard is composed of horizontal wooden slats, adding a subtle textured detail. This bed frame is designed to be functional and durable, suitable for a contemporary bedroom setting.
